title: Point Blank - Ferret's Skins
description: Adds a few skins to Point Blank
body:
Adds some skins to Vic's Point Blank
Adds:
- AK-47:
  - Black Furniture
  - Golden
  - Luxury
- AN-94 "Bleeding Edge" Animate Observer
- AR-57 Blackout
- Desert Eagle:
  - Black Finish
  - Freshly Polished
  - Golden Finish
- G3 Wood Furniture
- Glock 17 Bisexual Pride
- M1014 Tiny Sticker of Jazz from Hit Music Artist YonKaGor
- M16A1:
  - Bloodied
  - Mud Coated
- M870:
  - Classic
  - Stickerless
  - Wood Furniture
- MP7 Stockless
- SPAS-12 Stockless
- Vector:
  - Black Furniture
  - Whiteout
  - Wood Furniture
